{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41889", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

SQL Injection can occur when:

1. The non-default simple protocol is used.
2. A dollar quoted string literal is used in the SQL query.
3. That string literal contains text that would be would be interpreted as a placeholder outside of a string literal.
4. The value of that placeholder is controllable by the attacker.

e.g.

```go
attackValue := `$tag$; drop table canary; --`
_, err = tx.Exec(ctx, `select $tag$ $1 $tag$, $1`, pgx.QueryExecModeSimpleProtocol, attackValue)
```

This is unlikely to occur outside of a contrived scenario.

### Patches

The problem is resolved in v5.9.2.

### Workarounds

Do not use the simple protocol to execute queries matching all the above conditions.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00356, "percentile": 0.27571}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T20:46:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41889"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T17:16:31Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T20:46:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jackc/pgx/security/advisories/GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx", "https://github.com/jackc/pgx/commit/60644f84918a8af66d14a4b0d865d4edafd955da", "https://github.com/jackc/pgx/releases/tag/v5.9.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41889", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jackc/pgx/security-advisories/GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jackc/pgx", "summary": "pgx: SQL Injection via placeholder confusion with dollar quoted string literals", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:30:27Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j88v-2chj-qfwx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.9.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.9.2"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/jackc/pgx/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.18.3"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/jackc/pgx"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.6.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pgx: SQL Injection via placeholder confusion with dollar quoted string literals
